title: Patient Recovery
effect: You gain an extra ten-minute recovery roll each day. Enabler. Pay It Forward (3 Intellect points): You can pass on what you’ve learned. When you give another character a suggestion involving their next action that is not an attack, their action is eased for one minute. Action.
details: You gain an extra ten-minute recovery roll each day. Enabler.

Pay It Forward (3 Intellect points): You can pass on what you’ve learned. When you give another character a suggestion involving their next action that is not an attack, their action is eased for one minute. Action.
